name: InstaInsight Codespace
postCreateCommand: npm install && python3 -m venv /home/node/venv && /home/node/venv/bin/pip install --upgrade pip uv && UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache /home/node/venv/bin/uv pip install -r requirements.txt && /home/node/venv/bin/playwright install chromium && /home/node/venv/bin/patchright install chromium && /home/node/venv/bin/scrapling install
